display_text: Snapfire is a ranged intelligence hero with a base attack range of 500. Her stats are balanced with 21 starting Strength, 16 Agility, and 21 Intelligence. Her base attack time is 1.8 seconds, which is average.
search_text: Snapfire ranged intelligence hero attack range 500 base attack time 1.8 stats strength 21 agility 16 intelligence 21

display_text: Snapfire has two Facet choices. 'Ricochet II' causes missed or glancing attacks to release two ricochet attacks at nearby enemies, synergizing with her passive and Lil' Shredder. 'Full Bore' makes Scatterblast narrower and longer and grants bonus damage and slow to enemies NOT at point-blank range, changing its use pattern from a close-range nuke to a long-range poke and wave clear tool.
search_text: Snapfire Facet Ricochet II ricochet attacks missed glance Lil' Shredder Full Bore Scatterblast narrow long range bonus damage slow not point blank poke wave clear

display_text: In laning, use Scatterblast (Q) to secure ranged creeps and harass enemies. Firesnap Cookie (W) provides an escape or engage tool for yourself or your lane partner. The Ricochet II Facet can help you harass and last-hit more effectively when attacks miss. Focus on levels and gold to reach your power spikes.
search_text: Snapfire laning phase early game Scatterblast Q secure creep harass Firesnap Cookie W escape engage Ricochet II Facet last hit harass

display_text: Snapfire's first major power spike is at level 6 with Mortimer Kisses (R), giving her global teamfight presence and area denial. Level 12 (Ultimate level 2) increases the damage significantly. Levels 15, 20, and 25 provide major talent upgrades that boost her damage output (Scatterblast, Lil' Shredder), utility (Cookie cooldown), or ultimate power (more Mortimer Kisses). Key item timings like Aghanim's Scepter/Shard can also create spikes.
search_text: Snapfire power spikes level 6 Mortimer Kisses ultimate global teamfight level 12 ultimate level 2 damage level 15 talent level 20 talent level 25 talent Aghanim Scepter Shard

display_text: Hard counters to Snapfire include heroes with Break to disable her passive Buckshot, heroes with instant silences or hexes to prevent her from casting Mortimer Kisses or Firesnap Cookie, and heroes with high mobility to dodge her skillshots. Heroes that can close the gap quickly can negate her range advantage from Lil' Shredder.
search_text: Snapfire hard counters Break disable Buckshot passive instant silence hex stop Mortimer Kisses Firesnap Cookie high mobility dodge skillshots gap close Lil Shredder range

display_text: Core items for Snapfire include Arcane Boots for mana sustain, Force Staff to reposition or save allies caught by her Cookie, and Aghanim's Shard to add knockback and stun to Scatterblast. Rod of Atos or Gleipnir is also core for setting up her Mortimer Kisses combo.
search_text: Snapfire core items Arcane Boots mana Force Staff reposition save Firesnap Cookie Aghanim Shard knockback stun Scatterblast Rod of Atos Gleipnir setup Mortimer Kisses

display_text: In teamfights, Snapfire's role is area control and backline damage. Use Mortimer Kisses from a safe distance to zone enemies and damage key targets. Use Scatterblast to slow and damage groups. Lil' Shredder can shred the armor of a key frontliner. Use Firesnap Cookie to reposition a core ally into the fight or to save them.
search_text: Snapfire teamfight role area control backline damage Mortimer Kisses safe distance zone enemies Scatterblast slow group damage Lil' Shredder shred armor frontliner Firesnap Cookie reposition ally save

display_text: Scatterblast (Q) is a cone-shaped nuke with 800 cast range. It deals 100/160/220/280 damage and applies a 100% movement and attack slow for 1 second. Enemies within 450 range (point-blank) take 50% increased damage and slow (150 damage, 150% slow). The blast travels at 3000 speed and starts at 225 width, ending at 400 width. This ability does NOT pierce BKB.
search_text: Scatterblast Q nuke cone 800 range damage 100 160 220 280 movement slow 100% attack slow 100% duration 1.0 point blank range 450 bonus damage 50% increased slow 150% width 225 400 speed 3000 does not pierce BKB

display_text: Firesnap Cookie (W) targets Snapfire, an ally, or Mortimer, causing them to hop a fixed distance after a 0.3 second self-cast delay. The hop lasts 0.484 seconds and covers 425 distance. Upon landing, it deals 75/150/225/300 damage and stuns enemies in a 300 radius for 1.0/1.4/1.8/2.2 seconds. The cooldown is 18/17/16/15 seconds, with 0 starting charges. The cookie projectile travels at 1200 speed.
search_text: Firesnap Cookie W hop jump distance 425 delay 0.3 landing damage 75 150 225 300 radius 300 stun duration 1.0 1.4 1.8 2.2 cooldown 18 17 16 15 charges 0 projectile speed 1200

display_text: Lil' Shredder (E) is an active ability that lasts 6 seconds. It grants Snapfire 300 attack speed and increases her attack range by 160/240/320/400. For the next 5 attacks, she rapidly fires, dealing 20/35/50/65 fixed damage plus 35% of her attack damage per hit. Each hit reduces the target's armor by 0.5 for 5 seconds. It sets her base attack time to 1.0 for the duration.
search_text: Lil Shredder E duration 6 attack speed 300 bonus attack range 160 240 320 400 attacks 5 fixed damage 20 35 50 65 plus 35% attack damage armor reduction 0.5 for 5 seconds base attack time 1.0

display_text: Mortimer Kisses (R) is a channeled ultimate. Over 5.5 seconds, Snapfire launches 8 globs. Each glob can be targeted with a right-click, has a minimum range of 600, and travels between 0.8 and 2.0 seconds. Globs deal 180/270/360 impact damage in a 275 radius and create a pool that lasts 3.5 seconds, applying 60/80/100 damage every 0.5 seconds (DPS) and slowing movement by 15%/20%/25%. Snapfire's turn rate is reduced to 75 during the channel. This ability does NOT pierce BKB.
search_text: Mortimer Kisses R ultimate channeled duration 5.5 globs 8 targetable min range 600 travel time 0.8 to 2.0 impact damage 180 270 360 radius 275 burn pool duration 3.5 burn damage 60 80 100 DPS slow 15% 20% 25% turn rate reduced 75 does not pierce BKB

display_text: Gobble Up (D) allows Mortimer to swallow a creep or allied hero, storing it for up to 3 seconds before Spit Out can be used. Spit Out (F) launches the swallowed unit, dealing area damage and stunning for 1.2 seconds based on the current level of Mortimer Kisses, and leaves a firespit pool that slows by 25% and deals 100 damage per 0.5 second for 3 seconds. Spit Out has no minimum range.
search_text: Gobble Up D swallow creep ally store Spit Out F launch unit area damage stun 1.2 slow 25% burn damage 100 per 0.5 sec duration 3 no minimum range Mortimer Kisses level

display_text: Buckshot is Snapfire's passive ability. When attacking enemy heroes, she deals 30% more damage. However, she has a 25% chance of a Glancing Shot, which deals only 60% of her attack damage. Attacks that miss can also trigger Glancing Shots.
search_text: Buckshot passive attack hero damage bonus 30% chance 25% Glancing Shot damage 60% miss

display_text: When playing against a lineup with high physical damage or heavy right-click carries, prioritize armor reduction from Lil' Shredder and build defensive items like Solar Crest or Assault Cuirass. The Ricochet II Facet can provide extra harass in lane against these heroes.
search_text: Snapfire scenario vs high physical damage armor reduction Lil Shredder defensive items Solar Crest Assault Cuirass Ricochet II Facet harass

display_text: When playing from behind, use Mortimer Kisses defensively to clear waves from a safe distance and stall pushes. Build utility items like Force Staff, Glimmer Cape, or Spirit Vessel to help your team survive. Focus on landing multi-hero Scatterblasts and Cookie stuns in fights to turn the tide.
search_text: Snapfire scenario playing from behind defensive Mortimer Kisses wave clear stall push utility items Force Staff Glimmer Cape Spirit Vessel multi-hero Scatterblast Cookie stun

display_text: Against mobile heroes like Puck, Storm Spirit, or Anti-Mage, landing Scatterblast and Mortimer Kisses is difficult. Use Firesnap Cookie to disrupt their positioning or save allies. Consider buying Rod of Atos or Scythe of Vyse to lock them down before using your spells. The Full Bore Facet may help land Scatterblast from further away.
search_text: Snapfire scenario vs mobile heroes Puck Storm Spirit Anti-Mage hard to land spells Firesnap Cookie disrupt save Rod of Atos Scythe of Vyse lockdown Full Bore Facet long range Scatterblast

display_text: With Aghanim's Shard, Scatterblast gains a knockback and stun. This upgrade allows you to set up your own Mortimer Kisses combo, peel for allies, or interrupt channeling spells. It significantly increases your control in fights.
search_text: Snapfire scenario with Aghanim Shard Scatterblast knockback stun set up Mortimer Kisses combo peel interrupt channeling control

display_text: At Level 10, choose between +70 Scatterblast Damage or +35 Mortimer Kisses Burn DPS. Scatterblast damage improves your burst and wave clear, while Burn DPS increases your ultimate's area denial and total damage over time. Choose Scatterblast if you need earlier fight impact, choose Burn DPS if you expect prolonged sieges or fights where enemies stand in firespit.
search_text: Snapfire talent level 10 left +70 Scatterblast Damage right +35 Mortimer Kisses Burn DPS burst wave clear area denial sieges prolonged fights

display_text: At Level 15, choose between +1 Lil' Shredder attacks or -4s Firesnap Cookie Cooldown. More Lil' Shredder attacks increase your single-target armor reduction and damage output against key heroes. Lower Cookie cooldown dramatically improves your and your team's mobility, escape, and initiation frequency. Choose Lil' Shredder if you are the primary damage dealer, choose Cookie cooldown if your team needs more saves and repositioning.
search_text: Snapfire talent level 15 left +1 Lil' Shredder attacks right -4s Firesnap Cookie Cooldown armor reduction damage output mobility escape initiation saves reposition

display_text: At Level 20, choose between +2 Lil' Shredder Targets or +60% Lil' Shredder Attack Damage. +2 Targets makes Lil' Shredder cleave, allowing you to reduce armor on multiple heroes and farm faster. +60% Attack Damage increases the damage of each Lil' Shredder hit significantly, making it a powerful single-target delete tool. Choose Targets for teamfight impact, choose Damage for focusing down a single core enemy.
search_text: Snapfire talent level 20 left +2 Lil' Shredder Targets cleave multiple armor reduction right +60% Lil' Shredder Attack Damage single-target delete burst

display_text: At Level 25, choose between +8 Mortimer Kisses Launched or the other talent. +8 Mortimer Kisses Launched doubles the number of globs from 8 to 16, massively increasing the ultimate's total damage and area coverage. This talent is incredibly powerful for sieging high ground or defending against pushes. The other talent choice is not specified in the data, but this talent is generally the preferred choice for overwhelming area damage.
search_text: Snapfire talent level 25 left +8 Mortimer Kisses Launched globs 16 double damage area coverage siege high ground defend pushes
